uek_baseline: 5.4 UEK6; 5.15 UEK7 available in later OL8
sysroot_target: linux-glibc-2.28-uapi-4.18 for RHCK / separate UEK target only if needed
recommendation: model libc as EL8; kernel track separately
notes: Oracle says glibc is the same whether running UEK or RHCK; kernel choice is separate.

sysroot_target: linux-glibc-2.34-uapi-5.14 for RHCK / linux-glibc-2.34-uapi-5.15 for UEK
recommendation: model libc as EL9; kernel track separately
notes: User-space compatibility is independent of kernel choice.
Oracle Linux 10 ships UEK by default on x86_64 plus RHCK; both are 6.12 class.
